critic_raw:
Preprocessing is fit on the full dataset: 'All preprocessing transformers (StandardScaler, rolling statistics) are fit on the combined dataset prior to splitting.' For the rolling 6-hour mean of patient arrivals, this means the rolling window is computed using observations from the validation and test periods to compute arrival rates for the training period. In a temporal context, this is direct future leakage into the training features.

The TCN architecture takes 'sequences of length 12 (the 12-hour history of arrival patterns preceding each check-in).' However, the study filters to patients with previous visits in the last 12 months, excluding new patients. In deployment, the ED serves all patients including first-time visits. The model trained on returning-patient data may have systematically different patterns than a full-population model, and the claimed performance improvement may not generalize to the excluded population.

The hypothesis focuses specifically on weekend and holiday data. The temporal split proportionally represents day types in each split, which is correct. However, holiday dates are relatively rare and clustered (major holidays are often on or near the same calendar positions year over year). With a 24-month dataset, holidays in the training period are likely the same calendar holidays as in the test period (e.g., Christmas training on year 1 Christmas, test on year 2 Christmas). The TCN could learn to memorize holiday-specific patterns rather than generalizing the temporal dynamics claimed.

The TCN uses dilation rates of 1 and 2 with kernel size 3, which gives a receptive field of approximately 9 time steps. For a 12-step input sequence, this is a modest dilation. The comparison with linear regression on the same 7 features (no sequencing) conflates the benefit of the TCN's temporal window with the benefit of the TCN's architecture—linear regression also has access to temporal features through the rolling mean, but the explicit sequence structure available to the TCN is a data advantage, not an architecture advantage.
all_issues_raised: The rolling 6-hour mean of patient arrivals is computed using the full dataset before splitting, meaning future arrival-rate observations from the validation and test windows directly inform the arrival-rate features used in training.

The dataset filters to patients with prior visits in the last 12 months, excluding new patients; the model is evaluated only on returning patients, and claimed performance may not generalize to first-time ED visitors who are excluded by design.

Holiday dates are temporally clustered at fixed calendar positions; with a 24-month dataset, the TCN can memorize year-1 holiday patterns and retrieve them for year-2 holidays, inflating weekend/holiday performance without learning generalizable temporal dynamics.

The TCN receives an explicit 12-step sequence while the baseline linear regression receives only scalar features including a pre-aggregated rolling mean; any TCN advantage may reflect access to sequence-level temporal resolution rather than architectural superiority.
all_issues_adjudicated: The rolling 6-hour mean of patient arrivals is computed using the full dataset before splitting, meaning future arrival-rate observations from the validation and test windows directly inform the arrival-rate features used in training.

The dataset filters to patients with prior visits in the last 12 months, excluding new patients; the model is evaluated only on returning patients, and claimed performance may not generalize to first-time ED visitors who are excluded by design.

Holiday dates are temporally clustered at fixed calendar positions; with a 24-month dataset, the TCN can memorize year-1 holiday patterns and retrieve them for year-2 holidays, inflating weekend/holiday performance without learning generalizable temporal dynamics.

The TCN receives an explicit 12-step sequence while the baseline linear regression receives only scalar features including a pre-aggregated rolling mean; any TCN advantage may reflect access to sequence-level temporal resolution rather than architectural superiority.
